description_long: This jersey barrier features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly dark, weathered metal body and a prominent yellow-and-black striped caution panel on its front and rear faces. The top section is covered with a textured, orange-yellow metal plate that bears the embossed warning 'AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY.' The side profiles are angular and taper upward, with additional yellow-and-black hazard markings for increased visibility. The surface shows signs of wear, including scuffs and some faded red markings, suggesting frequent use in high-traffic or restricted areas. Metal rods reinforce the structure horizontally, adding to its durability and security function. The overall appearance is utilitarian, designed to control access and provide a clear visual warning in urban or industrial environments.
description: A heavy, weathered metal jersey barrier with yellow-and-black hazard stripes and an 'AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY' warning plate, reinforced by metal rods and visible wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow-and-black caution panel, 'AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY' sign, and some red markings.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the angular, tapered profile and a smaller hazard-striped panel at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the caution panel and warning sign mirrored but less visible red markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, matching the other side with the same angular shape and hazard-striped panel.
